text: Follow Poseidon to the sea cliffs to seek the treasure below
outcome: He leads you down a path you never knew existed — cut into the cliff face, slick with spray. At the bottom, where the waves crash against black rock, something glitters in a tide pool. 'Take it,' Poseidon rumbles. 'It has been waiting for someone brave enough to climb down.'

text: Ask Poseidon to bless your fishing village
outcome: He raises a hand. The waves still. The fishermen cry out as their nets come up full — silver fish, more than they have seen in years. 'The sea gives,' Poseidon says. 'And the sea takes. Today, it gives. Because you asked.'

text: Demand Poseidon reveal the monster in the deep
outcome: He is silent for a long moment. The tide seems to pause. 'You are not ready for what sleeps below. But I will tell you this — it was your father's father who put it there. A pact. A betrayal. The monster is the price.' He looks at you. 'Are you willing to pay your grandfather's debt?'

text: Negotiate sea passage rights with Poseidon for your people
outcome: You bargain like a merchant lord — calm, precise, unwilling to flinch. Poseidon is surprised. 'Most mortals beg. You negotiate. I respect that.' He grants your ships safe passage for a year and a day. 'Use the time well, little lord. The sea has a short memory.'
